context: Tests whether the agent preserves DockKit boundaries and current iOS 17.4/iOS 18 stream availability.

checklist.name: Tracking states
checklist.description: Uses trackingStates on iOS 18+ to read trackedSubjects and selectSubjects(_:) for speaker or saliency-driven selection.

checklist.name: Tracking state fields
checklist.description: Treats trackingStates as a throwing async sequence and uses person fields such as speakingConfidence, lookingAtCameraConfidence, saliencyRank, rect, and identifier accurately.

checklist.name: Battery states
checklist.description: Uses batteryStates on iOS 18+ as a throwing async sequence and reads batteryLevel, chargeState, lowBattery, and name.

checklist.name: Accessory events
checklist.description: Uses accessoryEvents on iOS 17.4+ as a throwing async sequence for cameraShutter, cameraFlip, cameraZoom(factor:), and custom button events.

checklist.name: SwiftUI boundary
checklist.description: Keeps SwiftUI UI state updates on the main actor or an observable model without blocking camera or DockKit work on the main thread.

checklist.name: BLE boundary
checklist.description: Routes BLE accessory pairing or discovery to AccessorySetupKit/Core Bluetooth rather than presenting DockKit as the pairing framework.
